name: Therapeutic plasma exchange
summary: Plasma-exchange procedure tracked for circulating-factor modulation, with human biomarker evidence and adjacent disease-specific functional context.
mechanism_summary: Removes and replaces circulating plasma components, potentially changing inflammatory, proteomic, glycomic, metabolomic, and other systemic signals.

open_questions: Whether biomarker shifts translate into functional or disease endpoints
Which replacement fluids, schedules, and patient populations are relevant to aging biology
